summary: Your private AI memory for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Grok Discussion | Link
content: Memoriq is your private AI memory for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Grok. Save the conversations that matter in an end-to-end encrypted vault that only you can access. Open source, self-hostable, and built for people who don't want to lose valuable AI chats or trust another plaintext cloud service. Search, organize, and keep your AI knowledge under your control.
chineseSummary: 您的 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 和 Grok 讨论的私人 AI 内存 |关联
chineseContent: Memoriq 是 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 和 Grok 的私人 AI 内存。将重要的对话保存在只有您可以访问的端到端加密保管库中。开源、可自托管，专为不想失去有价值的人工智能聊天或信任其他纯文本云服务的人们而设计。搜索、组织并掌控您的 AI 知识。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
